title: Goozy Umami Monsoon Bean Delight
description: This nut-free-friendly monsoon dish features gooey dried white beans simmered in a savory umami sauce and baked until tender and golden.

ingredients.name: 1 can (14 oz/398g) drained, rinsed white beans
2 tbsp nutritional yeast (optional for umami boost)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in cumin, coriander, turmeric, bay leaf, and salt. Cook for about 2 minutes.
Pour in water and white beans. Bring to boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30-40 minutes or until beans are tender but still have some texture.
Stir in lemon juice and nutritional yeast (if using).
Gently fold the mixture into a baking dish coated with cooking spray or oil.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes, until bubbling and top is golden brown.
Serve warm as a side dish or over rice.
